era_context: Same as previous years: Late Bronze Age collapse aftermath, early Iron Age consolidation. Egypt under Ramesses XI; Phoenician city-states rising; Aegean Geometric period; Mesopotamian weakness; Vedic period in South Asia.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No events are attested for this year.
historiographic_note: No specific events are documented for -1026. The year falls within the reign of Ramesses XI and the broader period of Egyptian priestly consolidation and Phoenician expansion, but no contemporary records identify events for this specific year.
